description: Explicit Goal Engine command surface for OpenClaw runtime wiring

bootstrap.summary: Choose projection-first status or service-backed recovery for a fresh session

start goal.summary: Create a new goal and refresh projection. If an active goal already exists, inspect the conflict summary first; only set replaceActiveGoal=true when you explicitly want to abandon the old goal.

show goal status.summary: Read current goal, guidance, and local projection state. When a new external task just arrived, pass expectedGoalTitle first and block execution until the active goal is aligned. If alignment is blocked, do not call web_search, web_fetch, or other external tools until Goal Engine actions resolve it. Once alignment is clear, if web_search is unavailable, use the ready local multi-search-engine skill as the preferred fallback search path.

supervise external goal.summary: Compile a rough external-world task into a GoalContract, start the supervised goal, and require show goal status before any external execution.

record failed attempt.summary: Write failed attempt, reflection, updated guidance, and refreshed projection. Use this immediately after a confirmed blocked path, including fallback-search failure after alignment is already clear.

recover current goal.summary: Recover current goal and rebuild projection if missing

check retry.summary: Run retry guard and return a user-facing allowed or blocked explanation
